zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Stapleton於1415年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III30歲，母親Agnes Goddard31歲。她和William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1478年12月31日之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Stapleton于1415年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III30岁，母亲Agnes Goddard31岁。她和William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1478年12月31日之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Stapleton was born in 1415, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III, was 30 and her mother, Agnes Goddard, was 31. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley. She died before 31 December 1478, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Stapleton est née en 1415, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Goddard, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley. Elle est décédée avant 31 décembre 1478, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Stapleton 1415 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III 30 und ihre Mutter Agnes Goddard 31. Sie hatte mit William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 31. Dezember 1478 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stapleton è nata il nel 1415 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Agnes Goddard, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley. Morì prima del 31 dicembre 1478, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Stapletonが1415年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton IIIは30歳，母Agnes Goddardは31歳であった。彼女はWilliam Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1478年12月31日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Stapleton(이)가 1415년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Goddard(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 12월 31일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stapleton nasceu em 1415, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Goddard, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley. Ela faleceu antes 31 de dezembro de 1478, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Stapleton родилась в 1415 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Goddard, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley. Она умерла перед 31 декабрь 1478 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Stapleton nació en 1415, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Brian Stapleton of Carlton III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes Goddard, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con William Ingleby Lord of the Manor of Ripley. Murió antes de 31 de diciembre de 1478, en su pueblo.
